introSection: Super Jet is a steel roller coaster located at Parque Mutirama in Goiânia, Goiás, Brazil. The ride had previously operated at Playcenter São Paulo until 1996, before travelling the Brazilian fair circuit with "Millennium Park" before arrivnig at Parque Mutirama. When it re-surfaced at Parque Multirama, the cars and track had been repainted.
fullText: Super Jet is a steel roller coaster located at Parque Mutirama in Goiânia, Goiás, Brazil. The ride had previously operated at Playcenter São Paulo until 1996, before travelling the Brazilian fair circuit with "Millennium Park" before arrivnig at Parque Mutirama. When it re-surfaced at Parque Multirama, the cars and track had been repainted.
